checkedClaims.claimText: Recent neuro-symbolic work strengthens the case for typed, compositional, concept-level intermediate structures, and this repository uses that insight to define bounded LLMAgent-assisted normalization and explanation workflows that complement the deterministic frontier analysis [MAO-2025].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: recent neuro-symbolic work strengthens the case for typed compositional concept-level intermediate structures and this repository uses that insight to define bounded llmagent-assisted normalization and explanation workflows that complement the deterministic frontier analysis mao-2025
checkedClaims.note: Supports claims about typed, compositional neuro-symbolic concepts.

checkedClaims.claimText: A stronger learned observation layer could eventually enrich the normalization step and produce more nuanced conceptual explanations, while preserving typed, compositional neuro-symbolic concept structures throughout the workflow [MAO-2025].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: a stronger learned observation layer could eventually enrich the normalization step and produce more nuanced conceptual explanations while preserving typed compositional neuro-symbolic concept structures throughout the workflow mao-2025
checkedClaims.note: Supports claims about typed, compositional neuro-symbolic concepts.

checkedClaims.claimText: Neuro-symbolic concept work contributes the insistence that learned components should still operate over typed and compositional conceptual structures [MAO-2025].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: neuro-symbolic concept work contributes the insistence that learned components should still operate over typed and compositional conceptual structures mao-2025

checkedClaims.claimText: Recent neuro-symbolic work argues for concept-centric systems in which objects, relations, and actions remain typed and compositional even when learned components are involved [MAO-2025].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: recent neuro-symbolic work argues for concept-centric systems in which objects relations and actions remain typed and compositional even when learned components are involved mao-2025

checkedClaims.claimText: A learned component may therefore help propose candidate event or relation structures, but those proposals must be converted into explicit typed and compositional neuro-symbolic concept records with provenance and uncertainty annotations before they can influence theory induction [MAO-2025].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: a learned component may therefore help propose candidate event or relation structures but those proposals must be converted into explicit typed and compositional neuro-symbolic concept records with provenance and uncertainty annotations before they can influence theory induction mao-2025

checkedClaims.claimText: Recent neuro-symbolic work argues that learned systems are most useful when they still operate over typed and compositional conceptual carriers [MAO-2025].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: recent neuro-symbolic work argues that learned systems are most useful when they still operate over typed and compositional conceptual carriers mao-2025

checkedClaims.claimText: A learned component may therefore help normalize or propose candidate observational fragments, but those fragments must be turned into typed, compositional symbolic concept objects with provenance before they can affect theory induction [MAO-2025].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: a learned component may therefore help normalize or propose candidate observational fragments but those fragments must be turned into typed compositional symbolic concept objects with provenance before they can affect theory induction mao-2025
